source_files.pdf: Generated `specs.md` from official manufacturer URLs previously stored in `pdf.txt`
source_files.finance: Generated from live official Rivian pages

finance_snapshot.msrp: Rivian states an additional R2 Standard variant will arrive in late 2027 starting around $45,000.
finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: R2 is a future vehicle page, so final MSRP, destination, taxes, fees, and option structure are not yet fully published.
finance_snapshot.apr: No live APR program is published on the R2 reservation page.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: No public monthly finance payment is published on the R2 page.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Reservation and eventual purchase structure may differ; standard finance down-payment terms are not published.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: No public lease estimate is published on the R2 page.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Future incentives, tax treatment, and reservation-to-purchase economics are not yet finalized publicly.
finance_snapshot.warranty: Current production-vehicle warranty details do not yet establish final R2 purchase-program terms.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Buyers watching Rivian's next smaller SUV rather than today's larger R1S.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: The around-$45,000 entry point gives Rivian a materially lower price target than the R1 lineup.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Final pricing, timing, and equipment can change before launch, so the real transaction profile remains uncertain.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Rivian's official R2 page on March 26, 2026. Rivian shows R2 as Coming 2027 and notes an additional Standard variant in late 2027 starting around $45,000.

image_strategy.note: Official Rivian R2 share image used as the canonical image for this future-model entry.
